title: cutandia maritima var. loliacea
intro: Cutandia maritima var. loliacea, also known as Sea Couch or Loliacea, is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cutandia maritima var. loliacea include relieving congestion, soothing sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Cutandia maritima var. loliacea can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
